Šu-Bēlum answered: "Yes, I have taken what belongs to my slave Abu-šalim." Šalim-Aššur impressed on us what was sworn by the City, and Šalim-Aššur said: "In case the slave does not raise claim against your slave, will he then raise claim against my slave?" Šu-Bēlum answered: "If he raises claim against yours, I shall guarantee for the textiles and the donkey." The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.
